message:
feat(codegen): Add SetMethods dispatch for set method calls

- Add set method exports to methods.zig (add, remove, discard, clear, pop,
  copy, update, union, intersection, difference, symmetric_difference,
  issubset, issuperset, isdisjoint, and their update variants)
- Add SetMethods dispatch table in method_calls.zig
- Fix dict/set method ambiguity (update, clear, copy, pop exist in both):
  - Dict methods now check obj_type before dispatching
  - Set methods dispatch for .set, .unknown, and .class_instance types
- This fixes test_set.py which uses s.update(C(p), C(q)) with multiple args
  (set.update is variadic, dict.update takes exactly 1 arg)
